profile.title: Profile & portfolio
profile.subtitle: Real projects and context the AI uses for proposals and replies
profile.importHint: The AI reads your website and extracts your projects so you can review them before saving.
profile.importNoUrl: No URL configured. Type one or add it to your profile.
profile.importFound: {{n}} projects found across {{p}} pages. Review and save the ones you want.
profile.noProjectsHint: Import from your site or add a project manually so the AI can cite it.
profile.interviewHint: The AI proposes questions whose answers would make your proposals more concrete. Answer the ones you want; skip the rest.
profile.noQuestionsHint: Generate questions to enrich your profile with more context.
profile.answerPlaceholder: Your answer (feel free to add concrete details)…
profile.fNotesHint: Extra context to help the AI

workana.title: Workana
workana.subtitle: Assisted bidding on projects
workana.disabledDesc: Enable it to review Workana projects, draft proposals with AI, and approve them before sending. Use at your own risk: automating Workana may violate its Terms.
workana.comingSoon: Project capture, proposal generation and the replies inbox arrive in the next phases.
workana.awaitingLogin: Waiting for you to log in in the browser…
workana.connectHint: A browser opens for you to sign in to Workana once; the session is stored locally for the automated scans.
workana.feedTestDesc: Reads the public project feed to confirm the browser and scraping work. Sends nothing.
workana.scanDesc: Reads the feed, scores fit with your profile and AI-drafts the best ones. Sends nothing.
workana.scanSlow: May take a minute or two (AI evaluation + drafting).
workana.regenInstructionsPlaceholder: Instructions (optional). E.g. mention my e-commerce experience, make it shorter…
workana.styleExamplesHint: How many of your already-approved proposals to use as a style reference when drafting. 0 to disable.
workana.approvedNote: Approved · ready to send (sending still disabled)
workana.repliesDesc: Checks the Workana inbox, classifies intent and suggests a reply. Sends nothing.
workana.reauthDesc: Reconnect your account to resume the automated scans.
workana.feedPagesHint: How many feed pages (newest first) to walk per scan. More pages = more coverage, so no good opportunity slips through.
workana.targetingHint: Tells the evaluator which projects to favor and which to skip (e.g. SaaS, web/mobile apps, dashboards yes; no-code, n8n, WordPress, bug-fixes no). Edit freely; clear it to restore the default.
workana.autosendHint: Sends only the proposals you approve, best-first, respecting the interval and weekly cap. Requires "real sending" on. You can pause it anytime.
workana.maxSendsPerDayHint: Soft daily limit (0 = no cap; the weekly budget and interval set the pace).
workana.tos: Personal-use add-on. Automating Workana may violate its Terms (scraping and mass proposals are prohibited). Real sending is off and approval is manual; use at your own risk.
workana.allowSubmitWarn: Caution: once on, the "Send to Workana" button submits a real proposal and spends a connection. Each proposal is visible to the client and cannot be undone. Approval is still manual.
workana.dryOk: Fill OK: form and send button detected. Ready to send (nothing was sent).
workana.drySubmitMissing: Fill OK, but the send button wasn't found. Check the form before sending.
workana.sendDisabledHint: Turn on "real sending" in Settings to enable the button.
workana.sendingNote: Sending… If it's been stuck here a while, a restart may have interrupted the send: check on Workana whether the proposal already went out BEFORE retrying (reopen), so you never bid twice.

home.title: Home
home.subtitle: What needs your attention
home.reviewDesc: Approve, edit or reject emails and WhatsApps before they go out.
home.settingsDesc: Agency profile, API keys and WhatsApp connection.
home.assistDesc: Just ask Claude in chat: searching, importing, analyzing and writing are all done by prompt.

login.title: [AUTHENTICATION REQUIRED]
login.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Wait before retrying.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error occurred. You can try reloading this section.

validation.fixErrors: Fix fields with errors before saving

overview.title: Dashboard
overview.subtitle: General overview of your prospecting
overview.autopilotWarningTitle: Autopilot active — messages are auto-approved and sent
overview.autopilotWarningDesc: All generated drafts are approved without manual review. Disable it in Config if you prefer to review before sending.

today.title: Daily Queue
today.subtitle: What you need to do today
today.allCaughtUpDesc: No pending messages to review. New emails and WhatsApps appear here automatically.
today.approveAllEmailsConfirm: {{count}} pending emails will be approved. This action cannot be undone.
today.sendApprovedEmailsConfirm: All approved emails will be queued for sending. Continue?

review.noReplies: No replies yet. Email and WhatsApp replies will show up here.
review.title: Review
review.noEmailsDesc: Emails are generated automatically or from the lead details
review.noWasDesc: Generate WhatsApp messages from the lead details
review.instructionsPlaceholder: E.g.: mention that we offer a free diagnostic
review.selectMessageDesc: Pick a message from the inbox to see the full detail and act on it.
review.noMessagesDesc: Email and WhatsApp drafts will show up here as soon as they are generated.
review.heldNote: Fallback: WhatsApp goes out only if the email gets no reply within {{days}} days.
review.dupRetained: Its send is held so it doesn't receive two different services without your call.

campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.subtitle: Group your leads and configure each campaign
campaigns.noCampaignsDesc: Create your first campaign to start organizing your leads
campaigns.sequenceDesc: Define follow-up steps. Each step runs automatically after the configured delay. AI generates different content for each step.
campaigns.instructionsPlaceholder: E.g.: Focus on SEO, mention success case...
campaigns.deleteCampaignConfirm: Campaign "{{name}}" will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
campaigns.profileHelp: The profile defines the agency identity and the messaging angle (web or SEO).

profiles.title: Agency profiles
profiles.subtitle: Create several profiles (e.g. web development and SEO) and pick one when creating each campaign.
profiles.emptyDesc: Create your first agency profile to get started.
profiles.deleteConfirm: Profile "{{name}}" will be deleted. Campaigns using it will fall back to the default profile.
profiles.taglinePlaceholder: Your value proposition in one sentence

leads.title: Leads
leads.noLeadsDesc: Import a CSV from Google Maps to get started
leads.deleteLeadsConfirm: You will permanently delete {{count}} leads. This action cannot be undone.
leads.analyzeDesc: Analyze the business website to get a score and enable contact options.
leads.noWebDesc: This business has no website. Analyze to calculate opportunity.
leads.aiGenerateDesc: A personalized {{channel}} will be generated with AI based on the business analysis. You can review and edit it before sending.
leads.emailGeneratedMsg: Email generated. Review it in the Review section.
leads.waGeneratedMsg: WhatsApp generated. Review it in the Review section.
leads.qualityTooltip: Web quality: 0-100 score based on design, content and site functionality
leads.opportunityTooltip: Opportunity: 0-100 score based on web quality, SEO, reviews, available email and recommended services

templates.title: Templates
templates.noTemplatesDesc: Create your first {{channel}} template manually or generate one with AI
templates.bodyTextPlaceholder: Plain text version of the email...
templates.instructionsPlaceholder: E.g.: Focus on SEO service, mention we do free audits...
templates.emailAiDesc: AI will generate a 75-125 word plain text email, no spam words, with a soft CTA and customizable variables. Optimized for deliverability and compliance.
templates.waAiDesc: AI will generate a WhatsApp message of max 500 characters, conversational and natural, no HTML format, optimized to avoid blocks and reports.
templates.deleteTemplateConfirm: Template "{{name}}" will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.

blacklist.title: Blacklist
blacklist.subtitle: Excluded domains, emails and businesses
blacklist.emptyDesc: Add domains or emails you don't want to contact
blacklist.reasonPlaceholder: Why is this on the blacklist

abTesting.title: A/B Testing
abTesting.subtitle: Compare message variants and optimize results
abTesting.noTestsDesc: Create your first test to compare message variants
abTesting.statisticalNote: At least 30 sent emails per variant are needed to declare a winner with statistical confidence.
abTesting.instructionsPlaceholderA: E.g.: Focus on results and concrete data...
abTesting.instructionsPlaceholderB: E.g.: Use a more personal and friendly tone...
abTesting.declareWinnerConfirm: Variant {{variant}} will be declared winner. This will end the test.
abTesting.deleteTestConfirm: This test and its results will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.

search.title: Search Businesses
search.subtitle: Search businesses on Google Maps directly
search.searchPlaceholder: e.g. "cafes in Austin" or "dentists in LA"
search.searchPromptDesc: Enter the type of business and city, e.g. "restaurants in Chicago"
search.noResultsDesc: No businesses found. Try different search terms.
search.connectionError: Connection error. Verify the scraper is running.

settings.title: Config
settings.subtitle: Global system settings

system.languageHint: Dashboard interface language. Auto-detected from your browser on first visit.
system.proactiveHint: With Claude CLI, the assistant comments when you change page and suggests actions. The AI decides whether it's worthwhile or stays silent.
system.devModeHint: Claude CLI only. Lets the chat edit files, run commands and SQL to create routes or touch the database when no exact tool exists.
system.devModeWarning: The agent will be able to edit files and run commands/SQL on this machine. Use it only on localhost and in a version-controlled repo.

apiKeys.desc: Stored in the database and take priority over the .env file. Leave blank to keep the current value.
apiKeys.keepHint: Leave blank to keep the current key

aiEngine.desc: Choose which provider generates messages, analyzes websites and answers in the chat.
aiEngine.claudeCliHelp: Uses the logged-in claude CLI (Max plan), no API cost. Requires running "claude auth login". The chat agent also runs on your CLI session — no API key needed.
aiEngine.geminiHelp: Uses the Gemini API key configured below.
aiEngine.anthropicHelp: Uses the Anthropic API key configured below. Default model: claude-sonnet-4-6.

emailProvider.desc: How emails are sent. SMTP (your Workspace mailbox) needs no Resend, VPS or public URL, and usually lands better for cold outreach.
emailProvider.smtpHint: Gmail/Workspace: smtp.gmail.com port 587, username = your address, password = a Google app password. The From must be that mailbox or an allowed alias. After saving, set the selector to SMTP.

imap.desc: Reads a real mailbox (your Reply-To inbox) to capture replies into the inbox. Works locally, no public URL needed.
imap.hint: Use an app password (not your normal one). Gmail/Workspace: imap.gmail.com:993. Zoho: imap.zoho.com:993. The username is usually your Reply-To address.

assistant.title: Agency profile
assistant.description: Want to regenerate the profile from scratch using your URL? The assistant extracts name, description, services, contact and differentiators in a couple of clicks.

settings.targetCountryHint: Sets the regional language of messages (Mexican ≠ Argentinian ≠ Spain Spanish).
settings.servicesHelp: Selected services are used in analysis and message generation
settings.warmupValidation: Warmup values must be positive integers
settings.sendWindowHint: Local-hour window the messages go out in. Approved messages are spread within this window, spaced out to keep accounts healthy.
settings.sendNextDayHint: What you approve today goes out tomorrow within the window, not instantly.
settings.skipWeekendsHint: Avoid Saturdays and Sundays: anything approved on a weekend goes out Monday.
settings.waWarmupDesc: Gradually increase sends to avoid getting a fresh number banned
settings.trackingDesc: Open pixel and clicks. Must be publicly accessible.
settings.schedulerDesc: Runs scraping, generation and sending every 5 minutes

activityLog.bounceRateTooHigh: Bounce rate too high, sends paused automatically

chatbot.welcome: Ask me anything about your campaigns
chatbot.examples: I can manage campaigns, search leads, review emails, and more

shortcuts.title: What you can do
shortcuts.subtitle: I'll guide you based on what's set up and what's missing

prompts.profile: I want to set up my agency profile. Walk me through it step by step.
prompts.createCampaign: I want to create a new campaign. What do you need, and which channels can I pick (email, WhatsApp, or both)?
prompts.createCampaignLocked: I want to create a campaign, but I think the profile isn't set up yet. Help me with whatever's missing first.
prompts.searchLeads: I want to search for leads on Google Maps for one of my campaigns.
prompts.searchLeadsLocked: I want to search for leads, but I don't have any campaigns yet. Help me create one first.
prompts.reviewMessages: Show me the draft messages pending review.

warnings.title: Pending setup
warnings.promptEmail: One of my campaigns uses email, but it looks like it's not configured. What do I need and how do I do it?
warnings.promptWhatsapp: One of my campaigns uses WhatsApp, but it's not connected. How do I connect it?

shortcuts.title: Campaign Actions

phaseComplete.sending: Messages approved and queued for sending

shortcuts.noDrafts: No draft messages to send for this campaign

missingConfig.title: Configuration Required
missingConfig.subtitle: Cannot execute this phase. The following configuration is missing:
missingConfig.envHint: Environment variable — set in .env and restart

analyzeModal.title: Analyze Leads
analyzeModal.customDescription: Choose how many leads to analyze

onboarding.title: Set up your agency profile
onboarding.subtitle: Takes 2 minutes. The AI will use this to write messages in your voice instead of generic ones.

stepper.step1: How I get to know you

url.title: I have a website or portfolio
url.description: Paste the URL and the AI extracts name, services, contact and differentiators.

manual.title: I'll tell you myself
manual.description: Fill out a short form by hand. Useful if you don't have a public site yet.

skip.title: Skip
skip.description: Configure everything later in Settings. The AI will use generic defaults.

extract.title: Auto-extraction
extract.hint: Reading home, about, services and contact pages. Usually takes 5-15s...
extract.success: Done. Review the fields: what I extracted is marked, edit anything that doesn't fit.

identity.name: Brand name *
identity.taglinePlaceholder: Web and SEO for dental clinics
identity.description: Description of what the agency does *
identity.descriptionPlaceholder: We design and position professional websites for SMBs and freelancers...

services.hint: Select the ones that apply. The AI will only propose what's marked.

valueProps.hint: Real reasons why a client would choose you. The AI may mention them in messages.
valueProps.examples: E.g.: "10 years specialized in dental sector", "Results guarantee in 90 days"...

step3.hint: These go to settings. If you set an email/name before, they're pre-filled.
step3.emailHint: Must be verified in your Resend account.
step3.name: Name you sign with *
step3.nameHint: Appears as "{{name}} from [your agency]" in messages.
step3.countryHint: Sets the default regional language (Mexican ≠ Argentinian ≠ Spain Spanish).

tone.hint: Choose how you want messages to sound. You can change it per campaign later.

samples.professional: I checked your site and noticed your contact form isn't visible on mobile. That usually costs 2 out of 10 leads. We work with similar clinics; would you like me to show you how we'd fix it?
samples.friendly: Hi Marta, took a quick look at your site and it's really polished. Just one thing: on mobile the booking button is hard to find. Want me to show you a simple way to fix it?
samples.direct: Your site loads in 5s and that loses customers. In 2 weeks we'd get it under 1.5s. Want me to send you an analysis, no strings attached?
samples.consultative: I review sites in your sector and yours has three points where, by tweaking local SEO, you could capture searches the competition gets today. Want me to send it in writing?

test.hint: Send yourself an email to see how the signature looks and verify Resend works.
test.success: Sent. Check your inbox in a few seconds.

step4.footer: When you launch we take you to Campaigns to create the first one. Import leads (CSV or Google Maps), the AI analyzes and drafts, you approve.

errors.saveFailed: There was a problem saving the configuration
